title: Nebrioporus mascatensis
author: Ribera, Ignacio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Nebrioporus mascatensis  (Régimbart, 1897)    Published records.  RÉGIMBART (1897); BRANCUCCI (1985); HÁJEK & REITER (2014).   Material examined.  Loc.3: 1 spec. (very dark specimen);Loc.4: 1 spec.; Loc. 5: 8 spec. (one used for DNA extraction, voucher No. IBE-RA107, sequences published in ABELLÁN et al. 2013, FERY & RIBERA 2018); Loc. 6: 6 spec.; Loc. 7: 6 spec. (plus 1 larva); Loc. 8: 23 spec.   Hyphydrini
